Name: Read File Buffered
Description: Reads a file in chunks up to a maximum buffer size, splitting on a preferred character boundary.

EventOutputs.Name: ReadComplete
EventOutputs.Description: Fires when chunk is read successfully

SettingsInputs.Name: FilePath
SettingsInputs.Description: Path to the file to read

SettingsInputs.Name: SplitCharacter
SettingsInputs.Description: Preferred character to split on (reads up to last occurrence within buffer)

SettingsInputs.Name: ByteOffset
SettingsInputs.Description: Byte offset to start reading from (for continuation)

StateOutputs.Name: ByteOffset
StateOutputs.Description: Updated byte offset for the next read

StateOutputs.Name: IsComplete
StateOutputs.Description: True when entire file has been read

StateOutputs.Name: TotalFileSize
StateOutputs.Description: Total size of the file in bytes
